name: Obsbot Tiny 2 Lite AI-Powered 4K PTZ Webcam
description: Increase your content capture productivity while sticking to your budget with the help of the OBSBOT Tiny 2 Lite AI-Powered PTZ 4K Webcam.

features.Key Features: Compact USB-C PTZ Webcam with 4x Zoom | Supports up to UHD 4K30 Video and HDR | 1/2" CMOS Sensor, Optimal Low-Light Use | AI Auto-Tracking with Auto Zoom | AF, Gesture Control 2.0, 3 x Presets | Landscape, Portrait, and Image Flip | Dual Mics, Adjustable Noise Cancellation | OSC, SDK, Hotkey/Separate Remote Control | USB-C, 2-Axis Gimbal, Built-In Stand | Sleep Mode 2.0, Static Image Shield
features.What’s in the box?: OBSBOT Tiny 2 Lite AI-Powered 4K PTZ Webcam | USB-C Cable | USB-C to USB-A Adapter | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
